hooks.statusMessage: Checking push target and running Playwright tests...
hooks.command: $obj = $input | Out-String | ConvertFrom-Json; $cmd = $obj.tool_input.command; if ($cmd -match 'git push.+\b(main|master)\b') { @{ hookSpecificOutput = @{ hookEventName = 'PreToolUse'; permissionDecision = 'deny'; permissionDecisionReason = 'Direct push to main/master is blocked. Commit to a feature branch and open a PR for review — tests must pass before it can be merged.' } } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; exit 0 }; Set-Location 'C:\Users\mirel.palii\repos\3Ms-notifications'; $result = npx playwright test --reporter=list 2>&1; $exitCode = $LASTEXITCODE; Write-Output $result; if ($exitCode -ne 0) { @{ continue = $false; stopReason = 'Playwright tests failed. Fix all failing tests before pushing.' } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress }
